backstory.original: Ezmerelda (Ez) d'Avenir, a legendary monster hunter, has devoted herself to ridding the world of evil in all of its forms. After years of tutelage by her mentor, the vampire hunter Rudolph van Richten, Ez struck out on her own. She has since amassed a sizable personal fortune and an impressive arsenal of weapons for hunting monsters. Following the defeat of Strahd von Zarovich, Ez joins the Champions on their journeys through the world of Toril.
backstory.display: 艾丝美拉达（艾茨）·达文尼尔是一名传奇怪物猎人，致力于消除世上各种形式的邪恶。在她的导师，吸血鬼猎人鲁道夫·范·里希顿的多年指导之后，艾茨开始独立行动。此后，她积累了一笔可观的个人财富，以及各种用来猎杀怪物的特别武器。在击败斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇后，艾茨加入了勇士们在托瑞尔世界的旅程。

description.original: Ezmerelda hurls a mote of fire at a random enemy.
description.display: 艾丝美拉达向一名随机敌人洒出一把火焰之尘。

longDescription.original: Ezmerelda hurls a mote of fire at a random enemy.
longDescription.display: 艾丝美拉达向一名随机敌人洒出一把火焰之尘。

description.original: Ezmerelda attacks the enemy with the highest health, greatly debuffing them.
description.display: 艾丝美拉达会攻击生命值最高的敌人，对其施加减益。

longDescription.original: Ezmerelda attacks the enemy with the highest health, greatly debuffing them. The debuff gets stronger with each debuff applied in the current area.
longDescription.display: 艾丝美拉达会攻击生命值最高的敌人，对其施加减益。当前区域内每多施加一个减益，都会使该减益变得更强。

description.original: Ezmerelda marks enemies in various ways to help the rest of the formation take them down.
description.display: 艾丝美拉达用多种方式标记敌人，协助阵型中的其他人将其击杀。

description.original: Ezmerelda increases the damage of Champions in her column against Undead or other types of creatures via her specializations.
description.display: 艾丝美拉达通过她的专精，来提高与她同列的勇士对亡灵或其他类型生物的伤害。

description.desc: Ezmerelda marks enemies that she attacks, training other Champions to spot their vulnerable points. Marked enemies take $amount% more damage from all Champions for each Debuff Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
艾丝美拉达会在她攻击的敌人身上做标记，训练其他勇士发现敌人的弱点。阵型中每有一位减益勇士，所有勇士对被标记的敌人造成的伤害就会增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Ezmerelda debuffs enemies as she strikes them, causing them to take more damage when attacked by any Champion.
tipText.display: 艾丝美拉达在攻击敌人时会给他们造成减益，使他们在受到任何勇士攻击时都会受到更多伤害。

description.desc: Every time a debuff is applied to an enemy, the effect of Training Montage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively, up to $max_stacks times and resetting when changing areas.
每次对敌人施加减益时，“训练剪辑”的效果都会提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多 $max_stacks 层；在变更区域后重置。

Undead are Ezmerelda's favored foes. Whenever one of Ezmerelda's favored foes are killed while she is in the formation, she tracks it, increasing the base effect of Training Montage by $amount% for each favored foe killed (additively then multiplicatively). These stacks persist for the entire adventure, resetting when you complete it. Caps at $max_stacks favored foe kills.
亡灵是艾丝美拉达的偏好对手。每当艾丝美拉达在阵型中，而有一名她的偏好对手被杀死时，她会记录已死亡的偏好对手数量，并使“训练剪辑”的基础效果增加 $amount%（先加后乘）。这些效果会在整个冒险中持续叠加，在完成冒险时重置。上限为 $max_stacks 名偏好对手。

tipText.original: Ezmerelda increases her debuffs as the Champions defeat more undead, her favored foe. Ezmerelda can add additional favored foes with feats.
tipText.display: 随着勇士们击败更多亡灵（艾丝美拉达的偏好对手），艾丝美拉达能够施加更多减益。艾丝美拉达可以通过专长增加更多的偏好对手。

description.desc: Ezmerelda gains the Breaker role, and all Champions deal $amount% more damage against enemies with armor-based health, increasing their chance of breaking an armor piece. Additionally, if a hits-based or armor-based enemy is affected by Training Montage, successful hits against them remove an additional hit or armor piece.
艾丝美拉达获得突破者角色，所有勇士对拥有护甲的敌人造成的伤害提高 $amount%，破甲几率也会提高。此外，如果基于命中或基于护甲的敌人受到“训练剪辑”的影响，成功击中他们会额外移除一次命中或一件护甲。

specializationDescription.original: Ezmerelda expands her training regiment to concentrate on well-armored foes.
specializationDescription.display: 艾丝美拉达将训练范围扩大，以对抗护甲精良的敌人。

description.desc: The effect of Training Montage is increased by $amount% on enemies who are one of Ezmerelda's favored foes, and Threat Tracking counts each favored foe killed twice.
“训练剪辑”的效果对艾丝美拉达的偏好对手提高 $amount%，“威胁追踪”会将每个偏好对手被杀死的次数翻倍。

specializationDescription.original: Ezmerelda focuses on dispatching her favored foes quickly and efficiently.
specializationDescription.display: 艾丝美拉达专注于快速有效地击退她的偏好对手。

conditions.desc: Increases the effect of Training Montage by $(amount___4)%, or by $(amount___5)% if the current adventure is a Strahd patron adventure or variant.
Increases the effect of Training Montage by $(amount___2)%, or by $(amount___3)% if the current adventure is a Strahd patron adventure or variant.
将“训练剪辑”的效果提高 $(amount___4)%，如果当前冒险是斯特拉德赞助者冒险或支线任务，则效果提高 $(amount___5)%。
将“训练剪辑”的效果提高 $(amount___2)%，如果当前冒险是斯特拉德赞助者冒险或支线任务，则效果提高 $(amount___3)%。

specializationDescription.original: Ezmerelda steels herself in preparation when participating in adventures that Strahd has taken an interest in.
specializationDescription.display: 在参加斯特拉德有兴趣的冒险活动时，艾丝美拉达会时刻做好准备。

description.desc: While Ezmerelda is in the formation, 0-2 "Mist" enemies can spawn with each wave. When a "Mist" enemy is defeated, an enemy whose type matches one of Ezmerelda's favored foes appears from the mist, and all nearby enemies gain the Training Montage debuff.
当艾丝美拉达处于阵型中时，每波攻势都会产生 0-2 名“迷雾”敌人。击败“迷雾”敌人后，迷雾中会出现一个类型与艾丝美拉达偏好对手相同的敌人，且附近的所有敌人都会获得“训练剪辑”的减益。

description.original: I don't have the luxury for nightmares.
description.display: 我没有做噩梦的闲暇时间。

description.original: My mentor taught me that you can always forgive. Always.
description.display: 我的导师教我，总是可以原谅，总是如此。

description.original: Watch their feet. Which one is stronger? Take that one out.
description.display: 看看他们的脚，哪个更强壮？干掉那个。

description.original: Those old cuts on Zombies still hurt. Target them.
description.display: 僵尸身上的那些伤口仍然会痛。瞄准那里。

description.original: Tonight, we shall return the dead to their graves.
description.display: 今晚，我们要让死者回归墓地。

description.original: Use whatever you have around you.
description.display: 利用你周围的一切东西。

effects.description: Threat Tracking gains an extra stack for each favored foe killed

description.original: If I've fought it - I can track it.
description.display: 和我交过手的，我都能找到。

effects.description: Threat Tracking gains two extra stacks for each favored foe killed

description.original: No monster is safe from my blade.
description.display: 我的剑刃制裁一切怪物。

description.original: We will save this land by killing the devil of Ravenloft!
description.display: 我们会杀死鸦阁魔域的魔鬼来拯救这片土地！

description.original: Healing spells cannot save you from my blade!
description.display: 治疗法术也没法从我的剑下救你的命！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 50% and Ezmerelda's attacks prevent the target from healing for 10 seconds

description.original: Did you know owlbears are monstrosities? Very strange...
description.display: 你知道枭熊也是怪物吗？很奇怪吧……

description.original: The more I read, the more I crave battle with these creatures.
description.display: 越看越想和这些生物战斗。

description.original: I already know all of - What do you mean giants aren't humanoid?
description.display: 这些我都已经知道了——什么叫巨人不算类人生物？

description.original: Every creature has a weak spot. Watch and learn.
description.display: 所有生物都有弱点。好好看，好好学。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ezmerelda (Ez) d'Avenir, a legendary monster hunter, has devoted herself to ridding the world of evil in all of its forms. After years of tutelage by her mentor, the vampire hunter Rudolph van Richten, Ez struck out on her own. She has since amassed a sizable personal fortune and an impressive arsenal of weapons for hunting monsters. Following the defeat of Strahd von Zarovich, Ez joins the Champions on their journeys through the world of Toril.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Ezmerelda marks enemies with debuffs and tracks kills of certain enemies to train and support the formation in being more efficient.

event_upgrades.name: Training Montage
event_upgrades.description: Ezmerelda marks enemies in various ways to help the rest of the formation take them down.

event_upgrades.name: Threat Tracking
event_upgrades.description: Ezmerelda increases the damage of Champions in her column against Undead or other types of creatures via her specializations.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 艾丝美拉达（艾茨）·达文尼尔是一名传奇怪物猎人，致力于消除世上各种形式的邪恶。在她的导师，吸血鬼猎人鲁道夫·范·里希顿的多年指导之后，艾茨开始独立行动。此后，她积累了一笔可观的个人财富，以及各种用来猎杀怪物的特别武器。在击败斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇后，艾茨加入了勇士们在托瑞尔世界的旅程。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 艾丝美拉达会用减益效果标记敌人，并追踪对特定敌人的击杀，从而对阵型进行训练与辅助以提升效率。

event_upgrades.name: 训练剪辑
event_upgrades.description: 艾丝美拉达用多种方式标记敌人，协助阵型中的其他人将其击杀。

event_upgrades.name: 威胁追踪
event_upgrades.description: 艾丝美拉达通过她的专精，来提高与她同列的勇士对亡灵或其他类型生物的伤害。

display.name: 严重伤势

effects.description: 使所有勇士的伤害提高 50%，艾丝美拉达的攻击会在 10 秒内阻止目标接受治疗

original.name: Guide to Monstrosities
original.description: Did you know owlbears are monstrosities? Very strange...

display.name: 怪物指南
display.description: 你知道枭熊也是怪物吗？很奇怪吧……

original.name: Guide to Fiends
original.description: The more I read, the more I crave battle with these creatures.

display.name: 炼狱生物指南
display.description: 越看越想和这些生物战斗。

original.name: Guide to Humanoids
original.description: I already know all of - What do you mean giants aren't humanoid?

display.name: 类人生物指南
display.description: 这些我都已经知道了——什么叫巨人不算类人生物？

original.name: Lethal Study

display.name: 致命研究
display.description: 所有生物都有弱点。好好看，好好学。
